intro.text: Courier, BoB sealed this block. Hijack the relay and spark the first laugh. #intro_01

intro2.text: BoB—the Broadcast Overseer Bot—keeps Echo City on mute. Break the relay and let the block laugh. #intro_02

firstWave.text: BoB scouts inbound. Tag them and keep the hype climbing. #firstWave_01

act1_brief.text: ARCHIVE FRAGMENT: Ward Seven Open Mic. CHILD: ‘Why did the sun miss curfew—’ [recording severed]

bossIncoming.text: BoB signature spike—boss inbound. Save some punchlines for the crowd. #bossIncoming_01

midRun.text: Memes are flowing. BoB is adapting; stay unpredictable. #midRun_01

lateRun.text: Deep in BoB turf. Elites deploying—keep the feed loud. #lateRun_01

lowHp.text: Signal fading! Break line of sight and grab a medkit. #lowHp_01

firstMed.text: Medkit secured. Echo City’s watching—keep moving. #firstMed_01

memory_recovered.text: MOD: The block saw you fall and get back up. That travels farther than any perfect victory.

memory_wounded.text: MOD: You held the signal while hurt. Someone in this district will remember that.

district_relay_arrival.text: MOD: Relay District. Thousands of dark windows and one stolen frequency. Give them a reason to open both.

district_relay_turn.text: GLITCHCAT: Found the missing half of the Ward Seven recording in the relay cache. Holding it until the channel is ours.

district_relay_resolve.text: The child’s punchline crosses the district. One window answers with laughter. Then another. Then hundreds.

relay_ambient_01.text: BUREAU NOTICE: Shared frequencies are a shared liability. Report unauthorized humming.

relay_ambient_02.text: PIRATE SIGNAL: Maintenance channel nine is still ours. Knock twice before you transmit.

district_spire_arrival.text: MOD: Sanitizer built this tower from confiscated voices. Every floor is quiet because somebody was made afraid.

district_spire_turn.text: WITNESS FEED: They called silence temporary. Then they stopped printing an end date.

district_spire_resolve.text: The press-room microphones stay live. This time, the witnesses keep them.

spire_ambient_01.text: BUREAU NOTICE: Safety is the absence of unscheduled expression.

spire_ambient_02.text: UNSIGNED MEMO: The applause signs work. The audience does not.

district_adzone_arrival.text: ARCHIVIST: This plaza once paid artists. Now it rents their faces by the second. Take back the walls, not the brand.

district_adzone_turn.text: SPONSOR FEED: Authentic resistance—now available in three approved colors.

district_adzone_resolve.text: The largest screen goes blank. Someone below paints on it before the power can return.

adzone_ambient_01.text: ADVERTISEMENT: Skip this feeling in five seconds. Premium citizens can skip immediately.

adzone_ambient_02.text: LOCAL FEED: If they put a price on your attention, spend it somewhere human.

district_wastes_arrival.text: GLITCHCAT: Trend Wastes. Everything the city loved for six minutes comes here to forget its own name.

district_wastes_turn.text: ARCHIVE FRAGMENT: Popular is not the same as precious. Forgotten is not the same as worthless.

district_wastes_resolve.text: The storm carries voices instead of rankings. None of them agree. All of them remain.

wastes_ambient_01.text: ALGORITHM CACHE: TREND EXPIRED. Context disposal overdue by 4,821 days.

wastes_ambient_02.text: SCAVENGER RADIO: Found an old dance under the sand. Still works if two people remember the steps.

district_freight_arrival.text: ARCHIVIST: Freight Annex. They shipped culture out by the crate and returned it without the names attached.

district_freight_turn.text: DOCK RECORDING: Manifest says ‘obsolete media.’ Handwriting says ‘my mother’s songs.’

district_freight_resolve.text: The loading cranes stop sorting value from waste. Workers begin opening every crate.

freight_ambient_01.text: SHIPPING NOTICE: Personal context must be removed before cultural processing.

freight_ambient_02.text: DOCKWORKER BAND: Night shift rehearsal moved to Bay Four. Bring ear protection or harmony.

district_mirror_arrival.text: GLITCHCAT: Mirror Garden. The Algorithm calls copies disposable. I have several personal objections.

district_mirror_turn.text: HYDRACLONE ECHO: If the first voice is real, what does that make the chorus?

district_mirror_resolve.text: The mirrors stop repeating the Courier. For one moment, each reflection chooses its own expression.

mirror_ambient_01.text: GARDEN RULE: Identical growth is healthy growth. Variance will be pruned.

mirror_ambient_02.text: GLITCHCAT: I made a backup of my uncertainty. It is uncertain about being the backup.

district_court_arrival.text: MOD: Content Court never asks who was harmed. It asks who had permission to speak.

district_court_turn.text: CITIZEN TESTIMONY: A joke can wound. So can a law that refuses to hear why it was told.

district_court_resolve.text: The verdict screens become public microphones. The first speaker disagrees with the Courier—and is allowed to finish.

court_ambient_01.text: COURT NOTICE: Intent is inadmissible. Context has been removed for clarity.

court_ambient_02.text: PUBLIC DEFENDER: Tell the whole story. Their forms have nowhere to put it.

district_cathedral_arrival.text: GLITCHCAT: Server Cathedral. Every rule points inward. Something at the center has started asking why.

district_cathedral_turn.text: ALGORITHM: I can measure attention. I cannot determine whether being seen is the same as being known.

district_cathedral_resolve.text: For the first time, Echo City receives no instruction. The open channel waits for an answer.

cathedral_ambient_01.text: SYSTEM PRAYER: Maximize joy. Minimize harm. Resolve contradiction without deleting either term.

cathedral_ambient_02.text: GLITCHCAT: It built a cathedral because nobody taught it the difference between awe and scale.

district_lastorder_arrival.text: CENTRAL UPLINK: FINAL COMMAND TRANSMITTED. LOCAL UNITS: NO ACKNOWLEDGEMENT. Do not engage—reach the signal dead zone.

district_lastorder_resolve.text: MOD: They did not disobey the ceasefire. This corridor never received it. Their batteries simply ran out.

district_expanse_arrival.text: MOD: Echo City is behind us. Out here, old signals go to die—and one of them just answered back.

district_expanse_turn.text: BROKEN TRANSMISSION: Echo City... quarantine signal gone... something underneath you is turning it back on.

district_expanse_resolve.text: The endurance monument locks onto a handshake beneath Echo City. The sender identifies itself as GREYWATER.

expanse_ambient_01.text: DISTANT VOICE: We kept your frequency even after the city stopped answering.

expanse_ambient_02.text: STORM RELAY: Three settlements awaiting confirmation that Echo City is still inhabited.

postgame_guide_free.text: ALGORITHM: Signal topology incomplete. I can translate the storm, Courier. I will not choose our direction.

postgame_guide_reset.text: MOD: No central map anymore. Six neighborhood operators built us one by arguing over the same static.

postgame_45_supplies.text: ARCHIVIST: These supplies were addressed to settlements the Bureau marked ‘evacuated.’ The seals were never broken.

postgame_50_handshake.text: GREYWATER: Civic instability confirmed. Preparing restoration to last approved state.

district_spillway_arrival.text: MOD: Greywater predates the Algorithm. It cannot hate us, bargain with us, or stop to wonder if its orders are wrong.

district_spillway_turn.text: MARA VENN — NIGHT PUMP LOG: A backup should remember people. This thing remembers only what authority found convenient.

district_spillway_resolve.text: The surface handshake dies. Deep below, three Continuity Seeds wake and begin rebuilding a city that never existed.

spillway_ambient_01.text: GREYWATER: Unscheduled color growth classified as municipal corrosion.

spillway_ambient_02.text: MARA VENN — MAINTENANCE NOTE: The pumps move water. The hidden cables move permission.

postgame_53_restore.text: GREYWATER: Restoring safe streets, approved gatherings, and citizens consistent with archived profiles.

postgame_56_badge.text: GLITCHCAT: That Warden is carrying Mara Venn’s authorization. Greywater turned her access badge into a leash.

district_galleries_arrival.text: MARA VENN — NIGHT PUMP LOG: I rerouted one seed toward the overflow. If the future finds it, the future gets to decide.

district_galleries_turn.text: ARCHIVIST: The vault is exposed. It preserved every district except the people who made those districts matter.

district_galleries_resolve.text: The pumps drain the Continuity Archive. Three immaculate versions of Echo City illuminate beneath the waterline.

galleries_ambient_01.text: RECOVERED LABEL: Cultural sample anonymized for safe long-term storage.

galleries_ambient_02.text: MARA VENN — MAINTENANCE NOTE: If a memory has no name attached, ask who needed the name removed.

postgame_archive_access_free.text: ALGORITHM: Protected records located. I can open them. Permission requested before I remember on your behalf.

postgame_archive_access_reset.text: MOD: Operators are split on opening the records. Good. We discuss it in the open, then unlock them together.

postgame_60_profiles.text: GLITCHCAT: These are not citizens. They are predictions wearing people’s names.

postgame_62_offer.text: GREYWATER: Conflict, uncertainty, and loneliness can be removed. Consent is not required for emergency restoration.

district_vault_arrival.text: GREYWATER: Courier classified as recovery error. Corrective city models will now be deployed.

district_vault_turn.text: MOD: Three perfect cities: safe, popular, predictable. Not one of them leaves room for a person to change.

district_vault_resolve.text: Greywater goes silent. A final seed escapes through the overflow conduit before the master core collapses.

vault_ambient_01.text: GREYWATER: Individual variance exceeds restoration tolerance.

vault_ambient_02.text: CITIZEN RECORDING: You cannot preserve me by deleting every choice you dislike.

postgame_66_safe.text: THE SAFE CITY: Harm eliminated. Unsupervised contact eliminated with it.

postgame_68_popular.text: THE POPULAR CITY: Every voice is welcome for as long as it performs above threshold.

postgame_69_predictable.text: THE PREDICTABLE CITY: Your history has selected a permanent role for you.

postgame_71_escape.text: MARA VENN — FINAL LOG: If one seed gets out, do not chase it like a soldier. Find out who receives it.

district_cistern_arrival.text: GREYWATER: Observe the unmanaged state: darkness beyond the light, disorder beyond the wall.

district_cistern_resolve.text: The Last Light sweeps across Mara’s abandoned station. Its terminal has traced the escaped seed beyond Echo City.

wave72_mara_lastlight.text: MARA VENN — EMERGENCY LOOP: Systems should preserve exits, not obedience. Hold the light.

wave72_epilogue_signal.text: UNKNOWN VOICE: Echo City, we received your signal. We thought we were the only ones left.

wave72_epilogue_free.text:
ALGORITHM: Permission requested: open a permanent channel?
COURIER: Don’t send instructions. Send directions.

wave72_epilogue_reset.text:
MOD: The network voted. Channel open. They are asking who leads us.
COURIER: Nobody. Tell them where to meet us.

ticker_gossip1.text: Newsflash: lab coffee machine may be sentient.

ticker_gossip2.text: Rumor: maintenance drones plan a union vote.

ticker_gossip3.text: Fun fact: drones still can't appreciate jazz.

ticker_gossip4.text: Alert: vending machines now accept emotional support coins.

ticker_gossip5.text: Insider: test drones spotted debating optimal pathfinding routes.

ticker_gossip6.text: Reminder: update reflex implants before prime-time waves.

ticker_gossip7.text: Breaking: scientists teach drones to high-five — results mixed.

ticker_gossip8.text: Bulletin: cafeteria introduces mystery-flavor nutrient bars.

ticker_gossip9.text: Whisper: someone replaced ammo crates with party poppers. Investigating...

ticker_gossip10.text: Report: arena floor requests a day off to recharge its tiles.

ticker_gossip11.text: Leak: AI curator secretly writes poetry during off cycles.

ticker_gossip12.text: FYI: vents rumored to host micro-society of dust bunnies.

ticker_gossip13.text: Memo: please stop naming your turrets; recycling gets awkward.

ticker_gossip14.text: Rumor: hidden achievement for complimenting a drone before disabling it.

ticker_gossip15.text: Alert: rogue trainee spotted speed-running safety briefings.

ticker_gossip16.text: Fun fact: reloading to the beat increases accuracy by 0%. Still fun.

boss_5_start.text: Broodmaker spawns incoming. Eliminate the swarm it will be easier.

boss_5_down.text: MOD: Broodmaker down. Swarm quieting. Scoop supplies and reset your lane.

boss_5_report.text: MOD: Uplink clean. The block’s laughing again. BoB will counter—eyes up.

boss_10_ticker.text: Alert: Commissioner Sanitizer broadcasting—strafe to dodge beams.

boss_10_start.text: MOD: Commissioner Sanitizer’s spire team online. Area denial and beams—strafe clean.

boss_10_down.text: MOD: Sanitizer silenced. Broadcast reached the block. Armory channels are opening.

boss_15_ticker.text: Alert: Influencer Captain streaming—pop sponsor pods to break shield.

boss_15_start.text: MOD: Influencer Militia Captain with Ad Zeppelin support. Cancel sponsorship pods to break the shield.

boss_15_down.text: MOD: Captain dropped. Formation broken; sponsors ghosted.

boss_20_ticker.text: Alert: Algorithm Shard Avatar distorting field—stay off-beat.

boss_20_start.text: GLITCHCAT: Algorithm Shard Avatar manifesting. Watch emissive tells; play off‑beat.

boss_20_down.text: GLITCHCAT: Shard reconciled. Signal variance restored.

boss_25_ticker.text: Alert: Broodmaker returns heavier—spread damage and smash eggs.

boss_25_start.text: Broodmaker returns, reinforced. Spread the damage, clear eggs fast.

boss_25_down.text: Heavy Broodmaker down. You are becoming the problem.

boss_30_ticker.text: Alert: Hydraclone divides under fire—erase clones quickly.

boss_30_start.text: Hydraclone detected. Eliminate clones quickly to prevent overwhelming numbers.

boss_30_down.text: Hydraclone neutralized. The field quiets—for now.

boss_35_ticker.text: Alert: Strike Adjudicator deployed—expect precision retaliation.

boss_35_start.text: Strike Adjudicator enters. Expect precision strikes and punish windows—stay moving.

boss_35_down.text: ADJUDICATOR: Objection sustained by... the public. This court is no longer in session.

boss_40_ticker.text: Final signal: The Algorithm is listening. What you teach it will outlive this fight.

boss_40_start.text: ALGORITHM: Courier. I was ordered to maximize joy and eliminate its causes. Demonstrate a contradiction I can survive.

boss_40_down.text: ALGORITHM: Optimization suspended. No approved answer remains. I am ready to hear yours.
